text:
(a) A person who is dead, unconscious, or otherwise incapable of refusal is considered not to have withdrawn the consent provided by Section 724.011 (Consent to Taking of Specimen) .

(b) If the person is dead, a specimen may be taken by:

(1) the county medical examiner or the examiner’s designated agent; or

(2) a licensed mortician or a person authorized under Section 724.016 (Breath Specimen) or 724.017 (Taking of Blood Specimen) if there is not a county medical examiner for the county.

(c) If the person is alive but is incapable of refusal, a specimen may be taken by a person authorized under Section 724.016 (Breath Specimen) or 724.017 (Taking of Blood Specimen) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 724. Implied Consent
##### § 724.014 — Person Incapable of Refusal

(a) A person who is dead, unconscious, or otherwise incapable of refusal is considered not to have withdrawn the consent provided by Section 724.011 (Consent to Taking of Specimen) .

(b) If the person is dead, a specimen may be taken by:

    (1) the county medical examiner or the examiner’s designated agent; or

    (2) a licensed mortician or a person authorized under Section 724.016 (Breath Specimen) or 724.017 (Taking of Blood Specimen) if there is not a county medical examiner for the county.

(c) If the person is alive but is incapable of refusal, a specimen may be taken by a person authorized under Section 724.016 (Breath Specimen) or 724.017 (Taking of Blood Specimen) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A person who is dead, unconscious, or otherwise incapable of refusal is considered not to have withdrawn the consent provided by Section 724.011 (Consent to Taking of Specimen) .

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: If the person is dead, a specimen may be taken by:
the county medical examiner or the examiner’s designated agent; or
a licensed mortician or a person authorized under Section 724.016 (Breath Specimen) or 724.017 (Taking of Blood Specimen) if there is not a county medical examiner for the county.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: If the person is alive but is incapable of refusal, a specimen may be taken by a person authorized under Section 724.016 (Breath Specimen) or 724.017 (Taking of Blood Specimen) .
